title: Create a quote-to-contract revenue packet
persona: Revenue operations lead with CRM edit access
steps: Open the AMP36 Revenue ops workspace.
Review selected quote, opportunity context, pricing evidence, fulfillment feasibility, approval route, customer draft, contract handoff, and rollback plan.
expected: A persisted AssistantRevenueOperationsPacket is created with commercialSnapshotJson, feasibilityJson, pricingEvidenceJson, approvalRouteJson, customerDraftJson, contractHandoffJson, rollbackPlanJson, and leadershipSummary.
The packet selects a quote, records feasibility/pricing risks, and prepares approval-safe customer language.
No CRM quote, quote line, opportunity, customer communication, sales order, inventory, shipment, or contract record is mutated automatically.

title: Queue quote approval and contract handoff review
steps: Create or select a DRAFT revenue operations packet.
Add a review note describing the commercial decision.
expected: The packet status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED with actionQueueItemId, approvedByUserId, approvedAt, and approvalNote.
An AssistantActionQueueItem is created with actionKind assistant_revenue_operations_review and objectHref /assistant/revenue-operations.
An AssistantAuditEvent states that CRM, customer communication, fulfillment, and contract records were not changed automatically.

title: Feasibility risk and customer-send guardrails remain visible
steps: Open AMP36 when the selected quote has fulfillment, pricing, or contract risks.
Inspect the customer draft and contract handoff sections.
expected: feasibilityJson and pricingEvidenceJson list the risk drivers before approval.
customerDraftJson is editable/copy-ready and explicitly not sent automatically.
contractHandoffJson does not create, amend, send, or sign contracts automatically, and rollbackPlanJson preserves CRM and operational records until separate approval.
